Schnittstelle ILogger

Alle bekannten Implementierungsklassen:
AAppc, AInstrument, ASyxTestCase, MidiInterface, SysexRecorder, SyxChecksumTest, SyxDataStructTest, SyxListMidiDevicesTest, SyxMessageTest
public interface ILogger
Interface to the global message logger. Classes that want to use the global must implement this interface.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    default void
    errlog(int v, int ii, String format, Object... args)
    Writes a message to the error log.
    default void
    errlog(int v, String format, Object... args)
    Writes a message to the error log; shortcut for errlog(v,0,msg,args).
    default void
    errlog(String format, Object... args)
    Writes a message to the error log; shortcut for errlog(0,msg,args).
    default void
    errlog(Throwable e)
    Writes a throwable to the log (on all verbose levels).
    String
    getLogID()
    Returns the ID of this logger (max. 8 characters).
    int
    getVerbose()
    Returns the verbose level of this logger.
    default void
    log(int v, int ii, String format, Object... args)
    Writes a message to the log.
    default void
    log(int v, String format, Object... args)
    Writes a message to the log; shortcut for log(v,0,msg,args).
    default void
    log(String format, Object... args)
    Writes a message to the log; shortcut for log(0,msg,args).
    default void
    log(Throwable e)
    Writes a throwable to the log (on all verbose levels).
    default void
    logHrule()
    Writes a horizontal rule to the log.
    default void
    logHrule(int v)
    Writes a horizontal rule to the log.
    default void
    setLogIndent(int n)
    Sets the log indent.

  • Methodendetails

    • getLogID

      String getLogID()
      Returns the ID of this logger (max. 8 characters).

    • getVerbose

      int getVerbose()
      Returns the verbose level of this logger. Log messages

    • log

      default void log(int v, int ii, String format, Object... args)
      Writes a message to the log.
      Parameter:
      v - The verbose level of the message. The message will only be written if v<=getVerbose()
      ii - Increment indent, positive increments will be applied after printing the message, negative increments will be applied before printing the message
      format - The message format string
      args - The argument(s) to the format string

    • log

      default void log(int v, String format, Object... args)
      Writes a message to the log; shortcut for log(v,0,msg,args).
      Parameter:
      v - The verbose level of the message. The message will only be written if v<=getVerbose().
      format - The message format string
      args - The argument(s) to the format string

    • log

      default void log(String format, Object... args)
      Writes a message to the log; shortcut for log(0,msg,args).
      Parameter:
      format - The message format string
      args - The argument(s) to the format string

    • log

      default void log(Throwable e)
      Writes a throwable to the log (on all verbose levels).
      Parameter:
      e - The throwable

    • logHrule

      default void logHrule(int v)
      Writes a horizontal rule to the log.
      Parameter:
      v - The verbose level of the rule

    • logHrule

      default void logHrule()
      Writes a horizontal rule to the log. Shortcut for logHrule(0).

    • errlog

      default void errlog(int v, int ii, String format, Object... args)
      Writes a message to the error log.
      Parameter:
      v - The verbose level of the message. The message will only be written if v<=getVerbose()
      ii - Increment indent, positive increments will be applied after printing the message, negative increments will be applied before printing the message
      format - The message format string
      args - The argument(s) to the format string

    • errlog

      default void errlog(int v, String format, Object... args)
      Writes a message to the error log; shortcut for errlog(v,0,msg,args).
      Parameter:
      v - The verbose level of the message. The message will only be written if v<=getVerbose().
      format - The message format string
      args - The argument(s) to the format string

    • errlog

      default void errlog(String format, Object... args)
      Writes a message to the error log; shortcut for errlog(0,msg,args).
      Parameter:
      format - The message format string
      args - The argument(s) to the format string

    • errlog

      default void errlog(Throwable e)
      Writes a throwable to the log (on all verbose levels).
      Parameter:
      e - The throwable

    • setLogIndent

      default void setLogIndent(int n)
      Sets the log indent.
      Parameter:
      n - The new log indent
